screen: Knowledge Transfer to be received by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to view a list of knowledge transfer tasks assigned for me to receive, so that I can track what knowledge I need to acquire
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Knowledge Transfer to be received by me screen; When the page loads; Then I see a list with Task, Provider, Receiver, Assigner, Project, Start date, Due date and Status columns

screen: Knowledge Transfer to be received by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to search received knowledge transfer tasks using filters, so that I can quickly locate specific tasks
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter criteria; When I click Search; Then only tasks matching the criteria are displayed

screen: Knowledge Transfer to be received by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can clear my query and view the full list again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters; When I click Reset; Then all filters return to their default values and the full list is shown

screen: Knowledge Transfer to be received by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter received tasks by active or inactive employees, so that I can focus on the relevant workforce segment
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the screen; When I choose Active employees or Inactive employees; Then the list reflects only tasks for the selected employee type

screen: Knowledge Transfer to be received by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter received tasks by a date period using From and To calendars, so that I can review tasks within a specific timeframe
acceptance_criteria: Given I open the Period From and To calendars; When I select a date range; Then only tasks within that range are listed

screen: Knowledge Transfer to be received by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter received tasks by department, so that I can review knowledge transfer tasks for a specific department
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the screen; When I select a department; Then only tasks for that department are displayed

screen: Knowledge Transfer to be received by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter received tasks by status such as Initiated, Assigned, Reassigned, Received, Pre closed or Withdrawn, so that I can monitor tasks at each lifecycle stage
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the screen; When I select a status value; Then only tasks in that status are displayed

screen: Knowledge Transfer to be received by me
user_story: As an Employee, I want to see a weekly day breakdown (Su through Sa) alongside each received task, so that I can understand the day-wise schedule of knowledge transfer sessions
acceptance_criteria: Given tasks are listed; When I view the schedule columns; Then each task shows its Su to Sa day indicators
